tasks.subject: Add a tiny test utility module
tasks.description: Create a small `test_demo.py` (or equivalent in the repo language) with a `greet(name)` function that returns "Hello, {name}!" and a `add(a, b)` helper. Place it in an appropriate location matching the project structure.

tasks.subject: Add minimal tests for the utility
tasks.description: Add a minimal test file that asserts `greet` and `add` behave correctly. Use the project's existing test framework if any; otherwise a simple assert-based script is acceptable for this demo.
